## Checklist

- [ ] If `docs/**` changed: `python3 tools/check_en_fa_sync.py` passes
- [ ] If `scpcalc/**` changed: `cd scpcalc && make test` passes
- [ ] Design docs updated when calculator formulas/API change (`scpcalc/docs/`)
- [ ] No binaries committed under `scpcalc/bin` or `scpcalc/dist`
